name: Saudi Aramco — Engineering Approval Workflow
standard: Saudi Aramco Project Management Team (PMT) approval workflow + Inspection Procedures + Schedule Q
regulator: Saudi Aramco — Engineering Services / Project Management Office
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that enforce the Saudi Aramco approval sequence on every drawing, document and tender package: Proponent (operating organisation owning the asset) -> Engineering Discipline Lead -> PMT Project Engineer -> Project Manager -> Inspection (mandatory for safety-critical items) -> Approved-for-Construction (AFC) stamp. Each stage must be present and time-ordered; missing intermediate sign-off blocks issue-for-construction. Pairs with `aramco_saes_samss` (engineering refs) and `aramco_pim_qualification` (vendor pre-qual).
description_ar: تفعيل قواعد التحقق لمسار اعتماد أرامكو الهندسي — جهة المستفيد، رئيس التخصص، مهندس المشروع، مدير المشروع، الفحص، ثم الاعتماد للتنفيذ.
